## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New skill

## Which Skill?

- [ ] agent-code-detective
- [ ] html-first
- [ ] k8s-investigation
- [ ] learning-trail
- [ ] pre-commit-quality-gate
- [ ] New skill: _______________

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README.md)
- [ ] I have added tests if applicable
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] New skill includes SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter
- [ ] New skill includes at least one reference document
- [ ] Output artifacts are self-contained (no external deps)

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
